{
    "contract_id": "AXAGBSDC-<unique identifier>", ### Provide unique identifier for contract
    "name": "",
    "domain": "", ### Identify the domain of the dataset using AI by undesrtanding the Dataset Schema
    "version": "", ### Version of the Contract, starts from 1 (then 2,3,4,... on any update to contract)
    "dataset": {
        "name": "", ### Table name in databricks 
        "logicalType": "object",
        "physicalType": "table",
        "description": "", ### Summarized Description generated by AI
        "dataGranularityDescription": "", ### Summarized Granularity Description generated by AI (what one row of the dataset represents)
        "schema": {
            "type": "object",
            "properties": 
			### Loop over all the available columns
			[
                {
                    "physicalName": "", ### Column name as in Dataset
                    "dataType": "", ### Column Datatype
                    "attributeName": "", ### Human/Business friendly column name generated by AI
                    "criticalDataElement": "",### If its CDE or not (Y/N)
                    "description": "",### Description of the column Generated by AI
                    "isPII": "" ### If the column is PII or not (true/false), identified by AI
                },...
            ]
        }
    },
    "servers": [
	{
		"server": "Databricks"
		"type": "Delta Table"
		"config":{
			"workspace_url":"", ### Add from the existing Databricks connection details
			"associated_tables":[] ### Ask for user input
		}
	}
	],
    "quality": {
	
		### To be filled by AI
		
        "rules": {
            "completeness": [
                {
                    "ruleName": "", 
                    "ruleDescription": "",
                    "column_name": "",
                    "ruleCondition": "",
                    "ruleErrorThreshold": ,
                    "weight": 
                },...
                
            ],
            "validity": [
			
			{
                    "ruleName": "", 
                    "ruleDescription": "",
                    "column_name": "",
                    "ruleCondition": "",
                    "ruleErrorThreshold": ,
                    "weight": 
                },...
             
            ],
            "accuracy": [
			{
                    "ruleName": "", 
                    "ruleDescription": "",
                    "column_name": "",
                    "ruleCondition": "",
                    "ruleErrorThreshold": ,
                    "weight": 
                },...
			
			],
            "uniqueness": [
                {
                    "ruleName": "", 
                    "ruleDescription": "",
                    "column_name": "",
                    "ruleCondition": "",
                    "ruleErrorThreshold": ,
                    "weight": 
                },...
            ]
        }
    },
    "sla": {
        "availability": "", ### Ask for User input
        "support": 
		#### Fetch from product info page
		
		{
            "source_owner": "",
            "tech_support_email": ""
        },
        "slaProperties": 
		#### Fetch from product info page
		
		{
            "timeOfAvailability": "",
            "latency": "",
            "frequency": "",
            "retention": ""
        }
    },
    "changes": "", ### Updated by AI
